Allows the bearer to jump again in mid-air.
enchantment.more_enchanting.rooted.desc: Increases regeneration and resistance while sneaking.
When low on health, gain highly increased resistance but slow speed.
When low on health, gain increased attack damage.
enchantment.more_enchanting.leech.desc: Has a chance to heal the user when dealing critical hits.
enchantment.more_enchanting.momentum.des: Hitting enemies in quick succession increases attack speed.
enchantment.more_enchanting.marking.desc: Hitting enemies marks them, detonating when hit by an arrow.
enchantment.more_enchanting.curse_of_the: Gives the bearer the characteristics of undead monsters.
